source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析7》

segments.text: Man: I have in this studio with me Mary Smith from York Town Tourism, who is here to tell us about some of the events happening in our state capital over the next three weeks at the Spring Festival.
segments.translation: 今天来到演播室的是来自约克镇旅游局的玛丽·史密斯，她将向我们介绍未来三周州府春季庆典期间举办的一些活动。

segments.text: Man: So, Mary, what can we expect to see?
segments.translation: 那么，玛丽，我们能看到些什么呢？

segments.text: Mary: Well, being in York Town is such an exciting time.
segments.translation: 嗯，来到约克镇正赶上一个令人兴奋的时节。

segments.text: Mary: To kick off the Spring Festival, a vast firework will be displayed down by the lake, starting at 9 p.m. this Saturday, the 4th of September.
segments.translation: 春季庆典将以一场盛大的湖畔烟花表演拉开帷幕，时间是本周六，也就是9月4日晚9点。

segments.text: Mary: Over ten thousand fireworks will be set off.
segments.translation: 届时将燃放一万多枚烟花。

segments.text: Mary: All are choreographed to music and broadcast simultaneously here on Radio Yorkee.
segments.translation: 所有烟花都会配合音乐编排，并在约基电台同步播出。

segments.text: Mary: You should get there early if you want to get close to the action.
segments.translation: 如果想近距离观看，就应该早点到场。

segments.text: Mary: So, bring along a picnic and a blanket, as it could get chilly in the evening.
segments.translation: 所以请带上野餐食物和毯子，因为晚上可能会变冷。

segments.text: Mary: One thing that attracts visitors to the festival from all over the country is the fantastic collection of flowers on show in Central Park throughout the festival.
segments.translation: 庆典期间，中央公园展出的缤纷花卉是吸引全国各地游客的一大亮点。

segments.text: Mary: Special buses will run daily from the town centre to the show at 20-minute intervals for those who prefer public transport.
segments.translation: 对于喜欢乘坐公共交通工具的人，每天都有专车从市中心开往展览现场，每20分钟一班。

segments.text: Mary: If you are interested in seeing the latest in cars, from the fastest to the most expensive, then head over to The Motor Show at the Exhibition Centre from the 10th to the 15th of September.
segments.translation: 如果你想观赏最新款的汽车，从速度最快的到价格最昂贵的都有，那么请在9月10日至15日前往会展中心参观汽车展。

segments.text: Mary: It will be open daily from 9 a.m. until 10 p.m.
segments.translation: 展览每天上午9点至晚上10点开放。

segments.text: Mary: So, you can even pop in there after work.
segments.translation: 所以你甚至可以下班后顺便去看看。

segments.text: Mary: Do you like photography?
segments.translation: 你喜欢摄影吗？

segments.text: Mary: Then go along to 'Grow Your Imagination', an exhibition of photographs of famous gardens, which will be held at the art gallery from the 11th to the 19th of September.
segments.translation: 那就去参观“拓展你的想象力”吧。这是一场著名花园摄影展，将于9月11日至19日在美术馆举行。

segments.text: Mary: Come and be inspired by some of the world's most beautiful gardens.
segments.translation: 来这里，从世界上一些最美丽的花园中获取灵感吧。

segments.text: Mary: I have a sneak preview of some of the photographs, and they are magnificent.
segments.translation: 我提前看过其中一些照片，它们美极了。

segments.text: Mary: If music is more your thing, then you should come and hear the Australian Philharmonic Orchestra performing 'Swing in Spring' at the concert hall on Friday the 17th and Saturday the 18th of September.
segments.translation: 如果你更喜欢音乐，就应该在9月17日星期五和18日星期六前往音乐厅，欣赏澳大利亚爱乐乐团演出的“春日摇摆”。

segments.text: Mary: It's a celebration of dance music from the 1940s and 50s.
segments.translation: 这是一场致敬20世纪40和50年代舞曲的演出。

segments.text: Mary: There will be three performances.
segments.translation: 一共会有三场演出。

segments.text: Mary: Both evenings start at 7 p.m., and a matinee performance at 2.30 on Saturday.
segments.translation: 两晚的演出都在晚上7点开始，周六下午2点30分还有一场日场演出。

segments.text: Mary: So, get your dancing shoes on and hit there.
segments.translation: 所以，穿上你的舞鞋去现场吧。

segments.text: Mary: It's a guarantee to get your feet tapping.
segments.translation: 这场演出保证会让你情不自禁地跟着节拍跺脚。

segments.text: Mary: Those are just a few of the attractions on offer.
segments.translation: 这些只是众多精彩活动中的一小部分。

segments.text: Mary: But for something a little different, you could try 'Balloons Down Under', which is the largest gathering of hot air balloons in the southern hemisphere.
segments.translation: 不过，如果想尝试一点与众不同的活动，可以参加“南半球热气球节”，这是南半球规模最大的热气球盛会。

segments.text: Mary: It's well worth it because over 25 balloons of all shapes and sizes will be a fantastic sight.
segments.translation: 这绝对值得一看，因为25个以上形状和大小各异的热气球将构成一幅壮观的景象。

segments.text: Mary: I'm also happy to announce that one lucky person will get to go up in one of these free balloons.
segments.translation: 我还很高兴地宣布，一位幸运儿将获得免费乘坐其中一个热气球升空的机会。

segments.text: Mary: That is the prize in our unique Spring Festival competition.
segments.translation: 这就是我们特别举办的春季庆典竞赛的奖品。

segments.text: Mary: It usually costs you 200 dollars.
segments.translation: 这项体验通常要花200美元。

segments.text: Mary: So, it's not a bad prize.
segments.translation: 所以这个奖品很不错。

segments.text: Mary: I'm sure you all want a chance to win, so you'll need to fill out the entry form in today's paper of the York Town News.
segments.translation: 我相信大家都想获得获奖机会，因此你需要填写今天《约克镇新闻》报纸上的参赛表格。

segments.text: Mary: Don't forget to include your phone number and send it to Radio Yorkee.
segments.translation: 别忘了填写电话号码，并将表格寄到约基电台。

segments.text: Mary: Make sure your entry reaches us by 5 p.m. on Thursday, the 9th of September.
segments.translation: 请确保参赛表格在9月9日星期四下午5点前送达。

segments.text: Mary: Then to see if you've won, check out the festival's website on Saturday, the 11th of September, where we will publish the name of the lucky winner.
segments.translation: 然后，如果想知道自己是否获奖，请在9月11日星期六查看庆典网站，我们会在那里公布幸运获奖者的姓名。

segments.text: Mary: It's such a fantastic prize.
segments.translation: 这真是个很棒的奖品。

segments.text: Mary: So, hurry up and get your entry in.
segments.translation: 所以赶快提交参赛表格吧。

segments.text: Mary: So there you have it, just a few special events happening here in York Town over the Spring Festival.
segments.translation: 以上就是春季庆典期间约克镇举办的几项特别活动。

segments.text: Mary: And if you like any more details about ...
segments.translation: 如果你还想了解更多详情……
